title: Phase E: extract lesson data BAI_1..15 to src/data/lessons/ (keep import C, no content change)
action: Move-only extraction of the 15 lesson data objects out of src/App.jsx into src/data/lessons/ (per D2 and D4). The lesson data (BAI_1..15, lines ~64-1128) references ONLY the color token object `C` — nothing else. Steps: (1) For each n in 1..15, create src/data/lessons/bai-0n.js (zero-padded: bai-01.js..bai-15.js) with `import { C } from "../../lib/colors.js";` then `export const BAI_n = { ... };` — copy the object body BYTE-FOR-BYTE from App.jsx, changing NOT ONE character of content (per D2). (2) Create src/data/lessons/index.js that imports all 15 (`import { BAI_1 } from "./bai-01.js";` ... `import { BAI_15 } from "./bai-15.js";`) and re-exports `export const LESSONS = [BAI_1, BAI_2, ... , BAI_15];` in the SAME order as the current array (App.jsx line ~1129). (3) In src/App.jsx: DELETE all 15 `const BAI_n = {...}` definitions AND the `const LESSONS = [...]` line; add `import { LESSONS } from "./data/lessons/index.js";` near the other imports. App.jsx keeps using `LESSONS` by the same name. After deletion, `C` may become unused in App.jsx shell — remove the `import { C }` line ONLY if grep confirms C no longer appears in App.jsx code (it likely still does in the shell/header). Verify each import removal against diagnostics/grep. Do NOT alter any lesson content, wording, numbers, or token structure (D2). Do NOT touch static/ (D1). Do NOT change the App shell logic (Phase F). The smoke net + build are the regression gate — the net asserts each lesson renders >=3 stations and total >=100, so any dropped/garbled lesson fails it.

truths: src/data/lessons/ has bai-01.js..bai-15.js each exporting its BAI_n (import { C } only) and index.js exporting LESSONS in original order
lesson content is byte-identical to before (no wording/number/token change) (D2)
src/App.jsx imports LESSONS from ./data/lessons/index.js and defines no BAI_* or LESSONS inline
npx vitest run stays green (all 15 lessons, >=100 stations) and npm run build stays clean

artifacts.substantive: imports all 15 lessons, exports LESSONS array in original order

prohibitions: Do NOT change any lesson content — wording, numbers, tokens, order (D2)
Do NOT change the App shell/navigation logic (Phase F)

verify: npx vitest run && npm run build

trace.verify_output: npx vitest run: 1 passed (all 15 lessons render, stations OK). npm run build: 1540 modules transformed, dist/assets/index-DLX7e2ic.js 296.25 kB gzip 93.46 kB, built clean.
